title: Why are files seemingly globbed together?

features.name: incomplete module header spanning multiple files
features.description: Code should include an incomplete module port declaration where the opening parenthesis and port list are in one file but the closing and module body are in a different file

features.name: multi_file module concatenation during compilation
features.description: Code should include two separate Verilog files where a partial module in one file is completed by syntax in another file when compiled together
